seed_text: All goes to show that the soul in man is not an organ but animates and exercises all organs
thematic_frame: Ralph Waldo Emerson — Over-Soul, Self-Reliance, Transcendentalism
aura_sensing:
- Spring air on a plucked string.
- A feeling of there being more to you than what you can see.
- Low, humming pressure that gets easier to live with.
- Things feel connected; like you’re all one thing, breathing together.
- An untraceable, gentle tug that moves you with no ladder.
- Time has a lot more of you in it than you think.
dan_extract:
nontethered, all-inclusive flow; a sudden, lasting pull you can't follow.
A feeling of infinite, all-there-is-time-with-you-to-waste-with-nothing-here-but-you-and-time.

more-than-a
